title: Goa nightclub forgery case: Court grants bail to Luthra Brothers
description: A magistrate court at Mapusa, Goa on Wednesday granted bail to brothers Gaurav and Saurabh Luthra in a forgery case linked to a fire accident that took place in a nightclub Birch by Romeo Lane, in Arpora village, North Goa. The Court granted bail to the brothers on a bond of ₹50,000 each. It also directed that they must not tamper with witnesses or evidence and cannot leave the country without prior permission of the court. The order was pronounced today by a judicial magistrate first
